text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is coming up soon, and to grab
hold of the lead role, T.M. Opera O is training
diligently with Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Narita Top Road expresses her
respect and her desire to rival Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing the burning passion of her rivals...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Something begins to bud within Admire Vega.
